name: @sittir/rust
description: Typed Rust IR builder — 134 node kinds from tree-sitter-rust grammar

scripts.generate: rm -f src/factories.ts src/from.ts src/ir.ts src/utils.ts src/types.ts src/consts.ts src/index.ts templates.yaml tests/nodes.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types ../codegen/src/cli.ts --grammar rust --all --output src/
scripts.regenerate: pnpm generate && pnpm build && pnpm test

//native: Native artifacts are grammar-local implementation details for @sittir/rust, built from rust/crates/sittir-rust.
